page_content: Title Required Courses (9 credits) Database Systems 1 Data Modeling in Business 2 Data Analytics Electives (6 credits) Minimum 3-6 credits from this list BMGT302 Essential Programming Skills for Business Analytics 3 BMGT332 Quantitative Models for Management Decisions BMGT385 Operations Analytics BMGT400 Data Visualization and Web Analytics BMGT401 Big Data and AI using Cloud Computing BMGT404 Essential Data Skills for Business Analytics 4 Maximum 3 credits from this list BMGT347 Quantitative Financial Analysis BMGT394 Applied Quantitative Analysis BMGT447 BMGT484 Digital Marketing CMSC422 Introduction to Machine Learning 5 ECON414 Game Theory 6 ENCE402 Simulation and Design of Experiments for Engineers 7 ENEE436 Foundations of Machine Learning (Formerly ENEE439M) 8 INST414 Data Science Techniques 9 STAT430 Introduction to Statistical Computing with SAS Credits 3 3 3 6 15
